answeredQuestions.high-level-flow: Employees upload resumes, AI extracts skills, AI matches against project requirements, recruiter reviews recommendations
answeredQuestions.kpi-targets: Shortlist time from 5 days to 2 days, top-5 recommendation acceptance at least 70 percent, rationale visibility at least 90 percent
answeredQuestions.v1-resume-document-standard: Use token-efficient UTF-8 TXT format to reduce processing cost
answeredQuestions.v1-requirement-document-standard: Use token-efficient UTF-8 TXT format to reduce processing cost

referencesProcessed.keyFindings: Confirmed scope, goals, requirements BR-001 to BR-005, and v1 document standards
